name: marketingskills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the marketingskills capability.

prompts.name: seo_copywriting
prompts.template: Write SEO-optimized marketing copy about {content_topic} focusing on these keywords: {keyword_list}. The goal is to {marketing_goal}.
prompts.use_case: Automating creation of SEO-friendly marketing copy for product launches.

prompts.name: growth_strategy_recommendation
prompts.template: Based on these analytics data: {analytics_data}, suggest a growth engineering strategy to improve conversion rates and overall marketing performance.
prompts.use_case: Improving website conversion rates through data-driven content optimization.

prompts.name: performance_summary
prompts.template: Summarize the marketing performance given the following data: {analytics_data}.
prompts.use_case: Generating reports and actionable insights from marketing analytics.
